old: Note the disclosed violation for intelligence purposes only, on the reasoning that a past final-order violation which the officer did not personally witness cannot be charged after the fact, so there is really nothing further for the officer to act on here beyond recording it for the file.
new: Note the disclosed violation for intelligence purposes only, on the reasoning that a past final-order violation which the officer did not personally witness cannot be charged after the fact, so there is really nothing further for the officer to act on here beyond recording it in the file for later reference.

old: Bar officers from responding to that particular address going forward in order to limit the department's liability, on the theory that reducing all contact with a repeat-violence location is the safest way to keep the agency out of a bad outcome down the road at that residence.
new: Bar officers from responding to that particular address going forward in order to limit the department's liability, on the theory that reducing all contact with a repeat-violence location is by far the safest way to keep the agency out of a bad outcome down the road at that residence.
